## Description
<!-- Please include a summary of the change and which service/MVE it relates to. -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🚀 New MVE (Minimal Viable Example)
- [ ] 🛠️ Improvement to an existing MVE
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🧹 Chore / Maintenance

## MVE Quality Checklist ✅
<!-- Please ensure your PR meets the requirements defined in CONTRIBUTION.md -->

### Structure & Code
- [ ] The MVE is located in a new folder under `src/`.
- [ ] Includes a working `.devcontainer/` for one-click execution.
- [ ] Includes `pyproject.toml` and dependencies are managed with `uv`.
- [ ] Includes a `.env` file with default/local values.
- [ ] All code, variables, and comments are in **English**.

### Documentation
- [ ] Bilingual documentation provided: `README.md` (English) and `README.es.md` (Spanish).
- [ ] Follows the standard structure (Quickstart, Step by Step, Validation, Clean up, etc.).
- [ ] The main repository READMEs (English and Spanish) have been updated with the new example.
